---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Here I write about science and endurance sports"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"
toc: false
comments: false
---

As scientists we are focused on conducting our own research, creating new knowledge and presenting it to our peers. Here I am trying to take the next step for my own work: I aim to provide additional research insights and communicate scientific ideas to a broader audience.

Topics will range from research article discussions, opinion pieces and coaching thoughts.
